value.stringValue: Please choose a Site or Job Role
No Candidates found, please adjust your filters

recordLookups.name: Get_Shift
recordLookups.label: Get Shift
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6 AND ((3 AND 4) OR (7 AND 8 AND 9))

recordLookups.label: Get Shift
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6 AND ((3 AND 4) OR (7 AND 8 AND 9))

recordLookups.name: Get_Shift_0_0
recordLookups.label: Get Shift
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND ((3 AND 4) OR (8 AND 9 AND 10))

recordLookups.name: Get_Shift_0_0_0
recordLookups.label: Get Shift
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 5 AND 6 AND ((3 AND 4) OR (7 AND 8 AND 9))

fields.name: TExt1
fields.fieldText:
Send Survey Notifications


Who do you want to send the survey to?

fields.name: Test
fields.fieldText: Enter the date range of Shifts you want to search:

validationRule.errorMessage: Start Date must be within the last 60 days

fields.name: twsfdw
fields.fieldText: Please provide details on the message you want to send:

fields.name: Do_you_want_to_send_a_SMS_or_App_Notification
fields.fieldText: Do you want to send a SMS or App Notification

value.stringValue: Which number do you want to send from:

fields.name: Text4
fields.fieldText: We have found the following Candidates who match your filters, please feel free to exclude any at this stage:
